Dan Rae Hugo has never heard of the Asean Petroleum Security Agreement. All he knows is that his diesel costs have doubled, his profit margins have evaporated and the rice on his neighbours’ tables now costs 20 per cent more than it did before the Iran war.

news.headline: Israeli and Palestinian groups urge world not to abandon two-state solution
news.summary: Israeli and Palestinian civil society groups appealed to the international community in France on Friday to keep pursuing a two-state solution, warning that the window for peace is narrowing. news.headline: World Cup Ticket Prices in Mexico City Too Expensive for Most Fans
news.summary: The opening game in Mexico City took place amid weeks of protests from groups including teachers’ unions complaining about pay and pensions.

news.headline: Afghans Hold Rare Public Protests Against Taliban Rules
news.summary: The United Nations said it was “deeply concerned” about the arrests of dozens of women, and reported that two people were killed in protests organized to support them.

news.headline: U.S. and Iran close to signing ceasefire deal, officials say
news.summary: After days of uncertainty and tit-for-tat military strikes, "text of the peace deal has been reached,” according to Pakistan's prime minister.

news.headline: U.S. Says Iran Cease-Fire Deal ‘Very Close’

news.headline: Canada Has Its Elbows Up and Arms Wide Open at the World Cup
news.summary: Facing President Trump’s threats, many Canadians have taken a defensive stance to their neighbor. But now Canada is playing co-host with the United States and Mexico, and welcoming the world.

news.headline: Palestine football chief says he wasn’t granted US visa to attend World Cup
news.summary: Jibril Rajoub remains in Mexico awaiting a US visa to attend the World Cup 2026.

news.headline: Bosnia, Canada share points in hard-fought draw at World Cup
news.summary: Cyle Larin's equaliser gives Canada first World Cup points after Jovo Lukic put Bosnia in the lead in the first half.

news.headline: Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire as SpaceX soars in stock market debut
news.summary: Musk is now worth $1.11tn according to the Bloomberg rich list, while SpaceX listed on the Nasdaq stock exchange with a value of $2.2tn.
